title: OmniFormatter Dart / Kotlin / Swift Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for mobile platform languages.

dart__dartfmtEnabled.description: [Dart] Apply dart format (formerly dartfmt) rules. Dart formatter is opinionated.

dart__trailingCommas.description: [Dart] Trailing commas in function parameters force multi-line formatting (dart fmt rule).

dart__constructorStyle.description: [Dart] Use initializer list syntax: MyClass() : field = value.

swift__braceStyle.description: [Swift] Opening brace on same line (K&R). Swift conditionals do not require parentheses.

swift__statementTerminator.description: [Swift] Semicolons are optional and strongly discouraged.

swift__indentCaseLabels.description: [Swift] Indent switch case bodies at the same level as switch (SE-0003).
